description: Style NoteTake formal dressing to the next level with this pair of trousers from mark taylor. The fall of the fabric gives a slim shape while offering all day comfort. Pair it with crisp formal shirt, a blazer, stylish cufflinks and leather shoes. Product DetailsBlack striped trousers made of polyester viscose blended fabric, has a flat front, two side pockets, two back pockets with loop and button closures, comfortable waistband with belt loops and a zipper and button closureMaterial and CarePolyester and viscose blendWash careDelicate machine washDo not bleach or wring by handDry in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 28
